About This Service

Our home lab test service offers safe and hygienic sample collection from your home, ensuring accurate and timely diagnostic reports.

We partner with accredited laboratories to provide a wide range of tests, from basic blood work to comprehensive health packages.

Who This Service is For

  • • Patients requiring regular blood monitoring
  • • Individuals seeking annual health check-ups
  • • Seniors who prefer avoiding diagnostic lab visits
  • • Busy professionals seeking convenience

Why Choose Our Lab Tests Service

Certified phlebotomists for collection
Accredited and high-quality lab partners
Digital report delivery via email/app
Home sample collection at your preferred time

Frequently Asked Questions

Is fasting required for all tests?

Fasting requirements vary by test. Our team will provide specific instructions when you schedule your test.

What Families Say

"Prompt service and accurate results. Sample collection was very professional."

— Meera, Chennai

Lab Tests

Professional Care • Personalized Support
